description: NinjaTrader 8 is open with real daily OHLCV data for SPY (Jan 2023 - Dec 2024) loaded. Deploy the 'SampleMACrossover' automated trading strategy on a new Daily chart for SPY. Configure the strategy parameters with Fast = 15 and Slow = 50, and set the Account to 'Sim101'. Enable the strategy and save the workspace to persist the configuration.
